2.4 The Ideal Offer

2.5 Bonuses
пғҳ Be creative

2.6 Guarantee
пғҳ 30 days, 45 days, 60 days, 120 days
пғҳ Normal Guarantee: 30 days
пғҳ Conditional Guarantee: вҖңshow me that youвҖҷve gone through each
module, show me the homework, and IвҖҷd be happy to give you your
money back.вҖқ
пғҳ Never offer a Conditional Guarantee alone, combine Conditional with
Normal Guarantee.
2.7 Important: expect REFUNDS

пғҳ Compete on Value not on Price

3.0 Homework: You need to brainstorm 10 possible one sentence product
descriptions that are transformation based. Then, of those 10, I want you to circle
the top three. When you get to the top three, I want you to go in and post them
to the community.
